items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this HTML: Semantic and Accessible Web Documents misconception? Bold text in the first row is enough for assistive technology to infer table headers.

items.title: Headers and scope: verified implementation facet
items.prompt: Associate row and column headers with data cells using the simplest sufficient mechanism. Build a bounded artifact demonstrating row and column header scope associations; the locked browser verifier checks observable structure, behavior, or computed presentation.
